entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume crop being evaluated for salinity resistance.

entities.name: SALINITY RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand high salt concentrations in the soil.

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: The environmental stress caused by high salt levels in the field.

entities.name: FIELD SCREENING
entities.description: The process of evaluating plants in a field setting to identify specific traits.

entities.name: GAMMA IRRADIATION
entities.description: The process of using gamma rays to induce mutations in seeds.

entities.name: ICCV6
entities.description: A specific cultivar of chickpea used as the source for progeny bulks.

entities.name: H208
entities.description: A specific cultivar of chickpea used as a control in the experiment.

entities.name: SALINITY SYMPTOMS
entities.description: The observable physical manifestations of salt stress on the plants.

entities.name: SEED NUMBER
entities.description: The quantity of seeds produced per plant.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of crop produced.

entities.name: STATISTICAL METHODS
entities.description: The mathematical techniques used to analyze the screening data.
